estimators.name: Matt Adamiec
estimators.title: Founder / Owner (functions as estimator)
education: Red River College — Civil Engineering Diploma (structural focus)
personalization_hooks: STRONG ANGLE: Matt is a Red River College Civil Engineering Diploma grad — direct shared-alumni hook for Ahmad.
Prior firm: KGS Group (well-known Winnipeg structural consulting engineer) — Matt has the structural-eng vocabulary and respects accurate takeoffs.
Grew up in a contracting household with his dad — values relationships and craftsmanship narrative; Ashrah's painter-training story will resonate.
Founded 2014 (12 years in) — small enough that Matt personally bids every job; he is the entire estimating department.
Won 'Best of TrustedPros 2020' across 6 categories incl. Painting — they have in-house painting capability; pitch as overflow / specialty (high-end finishes, large commercial scale).

sources.claim: Matt Adamiec, RRC Civil Engineering grad, prior at KGS Group, founded Valdek 2014

fallback_contact.name: Valdek main line via website
fallback_contact.title: Contact form
fallback_contact.rationale: Single-owner shop — Matt is the only relevant contact. Use website contact form or LinkedIn search by name.

needs_review_flags: Valdek is renovation-focused (basements, kitchens, baths, additions) — commercial scope is limited. Lower-priority target unless they're growing into commercial fit-up.
In-house painting capability noted — frame the pitch as overflow / specialty.
